imageAttachments.unsupportedByProvider: Image attachments are not supported by this provider.

chat.forkUnsupported: Fork is not supported by this provider.

rewind.confirmMessage: Rewind to this point? File changes after this message will be reverted. Rewinding does not affect files edited manually or via bash.
rewind.confirmMessageConversationOnly: Rewind conversation to this point? File changes will be kept.
rewind.noticeSaveFailed: Rewound: {count} file(s) reverted, but failed to save state: {error}
rewind.noticeConversationOnlySaveFailed: Rewound conversation, but failed to save state: {error}

fork.unavailableNoResponse: Cannot fork: no response to fork from
fork.commandNoMessages: Cannot fork: no messages in conversation
fork.commandNoAssistantUuid: Cannot fork: no assistant response with identifiers
fork.notSupported: Fork is not supported by this provider.

tab.cannotSwitchProvider: Cannot switch provider on a bound session. Start a new tab instead.

input.placeholder: How can i help you today?
input.planApproved: User approved the plan and started a new session.
input.steerFailed: Failed to steer the queued Codex message. It is still available.
input.customSystemPromptAdded: Instruction added to custom system prompt
input.agentInitFailed: Failed to initialize agent service. Please try again.
input.agentNotAvailable: Agent service not available. Please reload the plugin.
input.providerUnavailable: {provider} is disabled or not configured. Enable and configure it in Settings before chatting.
input.commandUnsupported: /{command} is not supported by the current provider.

toolbar.safeTooltip: SAFE is on: all AI changes to the current document are blocked.
toolbar.yoloTooltip: YOLO is on: AI may modify the current document from chat instructions.
toolbar.planModeTooltip: Plan mode: the AI can analyze but cannot modify the current document.
toolbar.cursorFlowTooltip: When enabled, the cursor automatically focuses the input after you select text.
toolbar.cursorFlowAriaLabel: When enabled, the cursor automatically focuses the input after you select text.

inlineEdit.unavailable: Inline edit unavailable: could not access the active editor. Try reopening the document.
inlineEdit.workspaceLoadFailed: Failed to load workspace files. Workspace @-mentions may be unavailable.
inlineEdit.invalidPath: Failed to attach file: invalid path
inlineEdit.unavailableMarkdownView: Inline edit unavailable: could not access the active Markdown view.

errors.documentEditingBlocked: SAFE is on. Turn it off to let AI modify the current document.
errors.noReplacement: Edit response did not include replacement text.
errors.noCliProvider: No enabled CLI provider is configured. Enable and configure Claude, Codex, or OpenCode in Settings.
errors.refineNoReplacement: Refine response did not include replacement text.
errors.selectSuggestionToRefine: Select text inside the suggestion block to refine.

slug.tooLong: {label} name must be {max} characters or fewer
slug.invalidChars: {label} name can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
slug.reservedWord: {label} name cannot be a YAML reserved word (true, false, null, yes, no, on, off)

message.interruptedHint: 路 What should TyporAi do instead?

subagent.backgroundTaskRenderFailed: Background task completed, but the result could not be rendered.

ask.hints: Enter to select 路 Tab/Arrow keys to navigate 路 Esc to cancel
ask.hintsImmediate: Enter to select 路 Arrow keys to navigate 路 Esc to cancel

plan.title: Plan complete
plan.readError: Could not read plan file: {error}. "Approve (new session)" will not include plan details.
plan.hints: Arrow keys to navigate 路 Enter to select 路 Esc to cancel

planApproval.title: Plan complete
planApproval.hints: Arrow keys to navigate 路 Enter to select 路 Esc to cancel

rewind.unavailableStreaming: Cannot rewind while the assistant is streaming
rewind.unsupportedProvider: Rewind is not supported by this provider.

userName.name: What should TyporAi call you?
userName.desc: Your name for personalized greetings (leave empty for generic greetings)

excludedTags.name: Excluded tags
excludedTags.desc: Notes with these tags will not auto-load as context (one per line, without #)

mediaFolder.name: Media folder
mediaFolder.desc: Folder containing attachments/images. When documents use ![[image.jpg]], Claude will look here. Leave empty for the workspace root.

systemPrompt.name: Custom system prompt
systemPrompt.desc: Additional instructions appended to the default system prompt

autoTitle.name: Auto-generate conversation titles
autoTitle.desc: Automatically generate conversation titles after the first user message is sent.

titleModel.name: Title generation model
titleModel.desc: Model used for auto-generating conversation titles.

navMappings.name: Vim-style navigation mappings
navMappings.desc: One mapping per line. Format: "map <key> <action>" (actions: scrollUp, scrollDown, focusInput).
navMappings.placeholder:
Map w scrollup
map s scrolldown
map i focusinput

requireCommandOrControlEnterToSend.name: Require Command/Ctrl+Enter to send
requireCommandOrControlEnterToSend.desc: When enabled, Enter inserts a newline. Command+Enter sends on macOS; Ctrl+Enter sends on Windows and Linux.

slashCommands.name: Commands and Skills
slashCommands.desc: Manage workspace commands and skills stored in .claude/commands/ and .claude/skills/. Triggered by /name.

hiddenSlashCommands.name: Hidden Commands and Skills
hiddenSlashCommands.desc: Hide specific commands and skills from the dropdown. Useful for hiding Claude Code entries that are not relevant to TyporAi. Enter names without the leading slash, one per line.

mcpServers.name: MCP Servers
mcpServers.desc: Manage workspace MCP server configurations stored in .claude/mcp.json. Servers with context-saving mode require @mention to activate.

plugins.name: Claude Code Plugins
plugins.desc: Manage Claude Code plugins discovered from ~/.claude/plugins. Enabled plugins are stored per workspace in .claude/settings.json.

subagents.name: Subagents
subagents.desc: Manage workspace subagents stored in .claude/agents/. Each Markdown file defines one custom agent.
subagents.noAgents: No subagents configured. Click + to create one.
subagents.renameCleanupFailed: Warning: could not remove old file for "{name}"

modal.name: Name
modal.nameDesc: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: Reviews code for bugs and style
modal.toolsDesc: Comma-separated list of allowed tools (empty = all)
modal.disallowedToolsDesc: Comma-separated list of tools to disallow
modal.promptPlaceholder: You are a code reviewer. Analyze the given code for...

loadUserSettings.name: Load user Claude settings
loadUserSettings.desc: Load ~/.claude/settings.json. When enabled, user's Claude Code permission rules may bypass Safe mode.

claudeSafeMode.name: Safe mode
claudeSafeMode.desc: Permission mode used when the Safe toggle is active.

codexSafeMode.name: Safe mode
codexSafeMode.desc: Sandbox mode used when the Safe toggle is active.

environmentShared.name: Shared environment
environmentShared.desc: Provider-neutral runtime variables shared across all providers. Use this for PATH, proxy, cert, and temp variables.

customVariables.name: Custom variables
customVariables.desc: Environment variables for Claude SDK (KEY=VALUE format, one per line). Shell export prefix supported.

envSnippets.name: Snippets
envSnippets.noSnippets: No saved environment snippets yet. Click + to save your current environment configuration.
envSnippets.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the snippet
envSnippets.aliasTitle: Custom label shown in the model selector. Leave empty to use the default.

modal.name: Name
modal.namePlaceholder: A descriptive name for this environment configuration
modal.envVarsPlaceholder: KEY=VALUE format, one per line (export prefix supported)

customModelOverrides.name: Custom model overrides
customModelOverrides.desc: Set model selector aliases and context window sizes for custom models.

customModelAliases.aliasTitle: Custom label shown in the model selector. Leave empty to use the default.

customContextLimits.name: Custom Context Limits
customContextLimits.desc: Set context window sizes for your custom models. Leave empty to use the default (200k tokens).
customContextLimits.invalid: Invalid format. Use: 256k, 1m, or exact count (1000-10000000).

enableOpus1M.name: Opus 1M context window
enableOpus1M.desc: Show Opus 1M in the model selector. Included with Max, Team, and Enterprise plans. API and Pro users need extra usage.

enableSonnet1M.name: Sonnet 1M context window
enableSonnet1M.desc: Show Sonnet 1M in the model selector. Requires extra usage on Max, Team, and Enterprise plans. API and Pro users need extra usage.

customModels.name: Custom models
customModels.desc: Append additional Claude model IDs to the picker, one per line. Environment model overrides still replace the picker.

enableChrome.name: Enable Chrome extension
enableChrome.desc: Allow Claude to interact with Chrome via the claude-in-chrome extension. Requires the extension to be installed. Requires session restart.

enableBangBash.name: Enable bash mode (!)
enableBangBash.desc: Type ! on empty input to enter bash mode. Runs commands directly via Node.js child_process. Requires view reopen.

validation.noNode: Node.js not found on PATH. Install Node.js or check your PATH configuration.

maxTabs.name: Maximum chat tabs
maxTabs.desc: Maximum number of concurrent chat tabs (3-10). Each tab uses a separate Claude session.
maxTabs.warning: More than 5 tabs may impact performance and memory usage.

enableAutoScroll.name: Auto-scroll during streaming
enableAutoScroll.desc: Automatically scroll to the bottom as Claude streams responses. Disable to stay at the top and read from the beginning.

deferMathRenderingDuringStreaming.name: Defer math rendering during streaming
deferMathRenderingDuringStreaming.desc: Show raw LaTeX while responses stream, then render math once when each text block completes.

expandFileEditsByDefault.name: Expand file edits by default
expandFileEditsByDefault.desc: Show Write and Edit diffs expanded when they first appear.

chatViewPlacement.name: Open TyporAi in
chatViewPlacement.desc: Choose where the chat panel opens when it is created

cliPath.name: Claude CLI path
cliPath.desc: Custom path to Claude Code CLI. Leave empty for auto-detection.
cliPath.descWindows: For the native installer, use claude.exe. For npm/pnpm/yarn or other package manager installs, use the cli-wrapper.cjs path (not claude.cmd).
cliPath.descUnix: Paste the output of "which claude" 鈥?works for both native and npm/pnpm/yarn installs.

validation.isDirectory: Path is a directory, not a file

language.name: Language
language.desc: Change the display language of the plugin interface

enableProvider.name: Enable Claude provider
enableProvider.desc: When enabled, Claude models appear in new conversations. Enabling Claude disables Codex and OpenCode.

plugins.empty: No Claude code plugins found. Enable plugins via the Claude CLI.
plugins.togglePartiallyFailed: Plugin toggled, but some tabs failed to restart.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Choose whether this entry is a slash command or a skill.

name.name: Name
name.desc: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

description.name: Description
description.desc: Brief description shown in the slash command list.

modelOverride.name: Model override
modelOverride.desc: Optional model to use for this command.

allowedTools.name: Allowed tools
allowedTools.desc: Comma-separated list of tools to allow (empty = all).

disableModelInvocation.name: Disable model invocation
disableModelInvocation.desc: Prevent the model from invoking this command itself.

disableUserInvocation.name: Disable user invocation
disableUserInvocation.desc: Prevent the user from invoking this skill directly.

agent.name: Agent
agent.desc: Subagent type when context is fork.

slashCommands.emptyNone: No commands or skills yet. Click + to add one.

customVariables.desc: Claude-owned runtime variables only. Use this for ANTHROPIC_* and Claude-specific toggles.

enable.name: Enable Codex provider
enable.desc: When enabled, Codex models appear in the model selector for new conversations. Existing Codex sessions are preserved.

installationMethod.name: Installation method
installationMethod.desc: How TyporAi should launch Codex on Windows. Native Windows uses a Windows executable path. WSL launches the Linux CLI inside a selected distro.

cliPath.name: Codex CLI path
cliPath.desc: Custom path to the Codex CLI.
cliPath.descNative: Custom path to the local Codex CLI. Leave empty for auto-detection from PATH.
cliPath.descWsl: Linux-side Codex command or absolute path to run inside WSL. Leave empty for PATH lookup inside the selected distro.
cliPath.descWindows: Custom path to the local Codex CLI. Leave empty for auto-detection from PATH. Use the native Windows executable path, usually `codex.exe`.
cliPath.wslModeError: WSL mode expects a Linux command or Linux absolute path, not a Windows executable path.

wslDistro.name: WSL distro override
wslDistro.desc: Optional advanced override. Leave empty to infer the distro from a WSL workspace path when possible, otherwise use the default WSL distro.

reasoningSummary.name: Reasoning summary
reasoningSummary.desc: Show a summary of the model's reasoning process in the thinking block.

skills.heading: Codex skills
skills.desc: Manage workspace Codex skills stored in .codex/skills/ or .agents/skills/. Home-level skills are excluded here.
skills.label: Codex Skills
skills.empty: No Codex skills in this workspace. Click + to create one.

hiddenSkills.name: Hidden Skills
hiddenSkills.desc: Hide specific Codex skills from the dropdown. Enter skill names without the leading $, one per line.

subagents.heading: Codex subagents
subagents.desc: Manage workspace Codex subagents stored in .codex/agents/. Each TOML file defines one custom agent.
subagents.label: Codex Subagents
subagents.empty: No Codex subagents in this workspace. Click + to create one.

name.name: Name
name.desc: Agent name Codex uses when spawning (lowercase, hyphens, underscores)

description.name: Description
description.desc: When Codex should use this agent
description.placeholder: Reviews code for correctness and security

nicknameCandidates.name: Nickname candidates
nicknameCandidates.desc: Comma-separated display nicknames (e.g., atlas, delta, echo)

developerInstructions.name: Developer instructions
developerInstructions.desc: Core instructions that define the agent's behavior
developerInstructions.placeholder:
Review code like an owner.
Prioritize correctness, security, and missing test coverage.

validation.nameTooLong: Subagent name must be {max} characters or fewer
validation.nameInvalid: Subagent name can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
validation.nicknameInvalid: Nickname candidates can only contain ASCII letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores

env.name: Custom variables
env.desc: Environment variables for Codex (KEY=VALUE format, one per line). Shell export prefix supported.

mcp.notice: Codex manages MCP servers via its own CLI. Configure with `codex mcp` and they will be available in TyporAi.

enable.name: Enable OpenCode provider
enable.desc: When enabled, OpenCode models appear in the model selector for new conversations.

cliPath.name: CLI path
cliPath.desc: Optional absolute path to the OpenCode CLI for this computer. Leave empty to use `opencode` from PATH.

validation.isDirectory: Path must point to a file
validation.isFile: Path must point to a file
validation.notFile: Path does not point to a file

models.heading: Models
models.aliasTitle: Custom label shown in the model selector. Leave empty to use the default.
models.emptyLoadFailed: Failed to load models from OpenCode. Check the CLI path and try again.
models.emptyStartOpencode: Start OpenCode to see available models.

visible.name: Visible models
visible.desc: Select which models appear in the picker. If empty, all discovered models are shown.

models.unavailableTitle: This model is not currently available from OpenCode

hiddenCommands.name: Hidden Commands
hiddenCommands.desc: Hide specific OpenCode commands from the dropdown. Enter names without the leading slash, one per line.

name.name: Name
name.desc: OpenCode agent name. Use slash-separated segments for nested agents.
name.slashLeadingTrailing: Agent name must use slash-separated path segments without leading or trailing slashes
name.segmentEmpty: Agent name path segments cannot be empty or whitespace-only
name.segmentWhitespace: Agent name path segments cannot start or end with whitespace
name.dotSegment: Agent name cannot include "." or ".." path segments
name.reservedChars: Agent name path segments cannot contain Windows-reserved filename characters

description.name: Description
description.desc: When OpenCode should use this subagent
description.placeholder: Reviews code for correctness and maintainability

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.invalid: Temperature must be a valid number

topP.name: Top p
topP.invalid: Top P must be a valid number

steps.name: Steps
steps.desc: Maximum agentic iterations before forcing text-only output
steps.invalid: Steps must be a positive integer

hidden.name: Hide from @mention
hidden.desc: Hide this subagent from the @ autocomplete menu

disable.name: Disable agent
disable.desc: Disable the agent without deleting the file

tools.name: Enabled tools (JSON)
tools.invalid: Enabled Tools must map tool names to boolean values

options.name: Options (JSON)
options.invalid: Options must be a JSON object

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.desc: Markdown body used as the agent prompt
prompt.placeholder: Review code changes carefully and call out correctness, regressions, and missing coverage.

agentList.label: OpenCode Subagents
agentList.empty: No OpenCode subagents in this workspace. Click + to create one.

env.heading: Environment
env.name: Environment Variables
env.desc: Extra environment variables passed to OpenCode. `OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXA=1` is enabled by default.

enable.name: Enable API
enable.desc: When enabled, the text-only API can be used in the model selector.

apiKey.name: API key
apiKey.desc: API key used to authenticate requests to the text-only API.

apiBaseUrl.name: API base URL
apiBaseUrl.desc: Base URL for the API. Leave empty for default.

apiModel.name: API model
apiModel.desc: Model ID to use for the API.

serverName.name: Server name
serverName.desc: Unique identifier for this MCP server.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Choose how the MCP server is launched or connected.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Disabled servers are not started and are not offered to the model.

contextSaving.name: Context saving
contextSaving.desc: When enabled, this server only activates when you @-mention it in chat, saving context tokens.

command.name: Command
command.desc: Shell command that launches the MCP server. Arguments are space-separated.

env.name: Environment variables
env.desc: One KEY=VALUE pair per line. Use the `export` prefix if your shell requires it.

headers.name: Headers
headers.desc: Custom HTTP headers, one KEY=VALUE per line.

modal.nameInvalid: Server name can only contain letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, and underscores

mcp.empty: No MCP servers configured. Click + to add one.
mcp.importInvalid: No valid mcp configuration found in clipboard
mcp.importEnterName: Enter a name for the server
mcp.reloadFailed: Setting saved but reload failed. Changes will apply on next session.

test.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Check the command's file permissions.
test.diskFull: Disk full or out of space. Free up space and try again.
test.configCorrupted: MCP configuration is corrupted. Please review and fix the JSON.
test.title: Verify: {name}
test.noToolsInfo: No tools information available. Tools will be loaded when used in chat.
